# DMR Documentation
> Dynamic MPI Reconfiguration library by the Barcelona Supercomputing Center.

Source: https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc

## Pages

- [dmr.h](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/api/dmr-h/)
- [dmr_policies.h](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/api/dmr-policies-h/)
- [Distributed Dataset](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/examples/distributed-dataset/)
- [Hello World](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/examples/hello-world/)
- [MiniDMR — Local Cluster](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/docker-sandbox/)
- [MareNostrum 5 Manual Install](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/installation-mn5/)
- [Installation](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/installation/)
- [Modes of Operation](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/modes-of-operation/)
- [Quick Start](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/quick-start/)
- [What is DMR?](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/what-is-dmr/)
- [Built-in Policies](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/policies/builtin-policies/)
- [Custom Policies](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/policies/custom-policies/)
- [Migration from Legacy API](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/policies/legacy-migration/)
- [Overview](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/policies/overview/)
- [Policy Context Reference](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/policies/policy-context-reference/)
- [References](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/references/)
- [Analytics](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/analytics/)
- [Application Structure](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/app-structure/)
- [Configuration](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/configuration/)
- [The DMR_AUTO Macro](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/dmr-auto-macro/)
- [Reconfiguration Callbacks](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/reconfiguration-callbacks/)
